chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2577 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 18.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Sohu, advocate for applicant Mr. Fayyaz Hussain, A.P.G. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, advocate for complainant ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicants/accused at the very out does not press the instant criminal bail application on merits and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of applicants/accused preferably within a period of two months. Counsel for complainant and learned A.P.G. have recorded their no objection for issuance of such direction. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicants/accused expeditiously, preferably within a period of two months. In case, case is not decided within the specified period, applicants/accused would be at liberty to move fresh bail application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
